column3: ['Submit an inappropriate PFA for trial flight request. ', 'System verifies that the submitted PFA does not meet all requirements. ', 'System rejects TDA and consultation package application for the inappropriate PFA. ', 'System communicates rejection of TDA and consultation package application to the inappropriate PFA. ']
column4: ['The system accepts the submission of an inappropriate PFA for a trial flight request. ', 'The system identifies that the submitted PFA is inappropriate and does not meet all requirements. ', 'The system refuses to process the TDA and consultation package application for the inappropriate PFA. ', 'The system informs the inappropriate PFA that their TDA and consultation package application has been rejected due to not meeting all requirements. ']
